neopixelExtended.Format: Different formats for RGB or RGB+W NeoPixel strips
neopixelExtended.Strip.clear:
Clears all NeoPixel colors in the buffer.
Call ``show`` to make the changes visible.
neopixelExtended.Strip.easeBrightness: Applies the given brightness to current colors in buffer using a quadratic easing function.
neopixelExtended.Strip.length: Gets the number of NeoPixels declared for the strip
neopixelExtended.Strip.power: Estimates the electrical current (mA) consumed by the current light configuration.
neopixelExtended.Strip.range|param|lengt: number of NeoPixels in the range
neopixelExtended.Strip.range|param|start: offset in the NeoPixel strip to start the range
neopixelExtended.Strip.rotate:
Rotates NeoPixel colors stored in buffer forward.
Call ``show`` to make the changes visible.
neopixelExtended.Strip.rotate|param|offs: number of pixels to rotate forward
neopixelExtended.Strip.setBrightness: Sets the brightness of the strip. This only applies to future operations.
neopixelExtended.Strip.setBrightness|par: a measure of NeoPixel brightness in 0-255.
neopixelExtended.Strip.setColor:
Sets all NeoPixel to a given color in the buffer.
Call ``show()`` to make the changes visible.
neopixelExtended.Strip.setMatrix25:
Sets the NeoPixel colors in the buffer 
of a strip of 25 NeoPixels.
Expecting strip to be arranged in a 5x5 matrix.
Call ``show`` to make the changes visible.
neopixelExtended.Strip.setMatrix25|param: first matrix row as array of rgb colors
second matrix row as array of rgb colors
third matrix row as array of rgb colors
fourth matrix row as array of rgb colors
fifth matrix row as array of rgb colors
neopixelExtended.Strip.setMatrix64:
Sets the NeoPixel colors in the buffer
of a strip of 64 NeoPixels.
Expecting strip to be arranged in a 8x8 matrix.
Call ``show`` to make the changes visible.
neopixelExtended.Strip.setMatrix64|param: first matrix row as array of rgb colors
second matrix row as array of rgb colors
third matrix row as array of rgb colors
fourth matrix row as array of rgb colors
fifth matrix row as array of rgb colors
sixth matrix row as array of rgb colors
seventh matrix row as array of rgb colors
eighth matrix row as array of rgb colors
neopixelExtended.Strip.setMatrixColor:
Sets NeoPixel to a given color in a matrix shaped strip
Make sure you have set the right width with ``setMatrixWidth()``
Call ``show`` to make the changes visible.
neopixelExtended.Strip.setMatrixWidth:
Sets the vertical number of pixels (width) in a matrix shaped strip
This is used in ``setMatrixColor()`` to calculate the correct position.
neopixelExtended.Strip.setMatrixWidth|pa: number of pixels in a row
neopixelExtended.Strip.setMatrixWiring:
Sets the direction how the matrix is wired on the
board.
This only applies to future operations. You will have to reset the colors of the matrix to see its effect.
It always expects the wiring to be
arranged in "snake" format e.g.
---->
<---' 
'--->
neopixelExtended.Strip.setMatrixWiring|p: direction of matrix wiring looking from the first NeoPixel to the second
neopixelExtended.Strip.setPin: Sets the pin where the neopixel is connected, defaults to P0.
neopixelExtended.Strip.setPixelColor:
Sets NeoPixel at the given position to a given color in the buffer.
Does leave all the other NeoPixels as they were.
Call ``show()`` to make the changes visible.
neopixelExtended.Strip.setPixelColor|par: position of the NeoPixel in the strip
neopixelExtended.Strip.setPixelWhiteLED: For NeoPixels with RGB+W LEDs, sets the white LED brightness. This only works for RGB+W NeoPixels.
neopixelExtended.Strip.setPixelWhiteLED|: position of the LED in the strip
neopixelExtended.Strip.shift:
Shifts NeoPixel colors stored in buffer forward. Clear with zeros.
Call ``show`` to make the changes visible.
neopixelExtended.Strip.shift|param|offse: number of NeoPixel to shift forward
neopixelExtended.Strip.show: Sends all the changes to the NeoPixel strip.
neopixelExtended.Strip.showBarGraph:
Displays a vertical bar graph based on the `value` and `high` value.
If `high` is 0, the chart gets adjusted automatically.
neopixelExtended.Strip.showColor: Shows all NeoPixel in a given color.
neopixelExtended.Strip.showRainbow: Shows a rainbow pattern on all NeoPixels.
neopixelExtended.Strip.showRainbow|param: the end hue value for the rainbow from 0 to 360.
the start hue value for the rainbow from 0 to 360.
neopixelExtended.colorNumberPicker:
RGB Color selection from a range
of 64 colors.
neopixelExtended.create:
Creates a new NeoPixel driver for `numNeoPixels` NeoPixels with 
brightness set to 128 (~50%).
neopixelExtended.create|param|format: data format used to sent data to the NeoPixels
neopixelExtended.create|param|numNeoPixe: number of NeoPixels in the strip
neopixelExtended.create|param|pin: the pin where the neopixel is connected.
neopixelExtended.hsl: Converts a hue saturation luminosity value into a RGB color
neopixelExtended.rgb: Converts red, green, blue channels into a RGB color
neopixelExtended.rgb|param|blue: value of the blue channel between 0 and 255
neopixelExtended.rgb|param|green: value of the green channel between 0 and 255
neopixelExtended.rgb|param|red: value of the red channel between 0 and 255
neopixelExtended.rowOf5: Creates an array for a row of 5 colors
neopixelExtended.rowOf5|param|rgb1: first RGB color of the NeoPixel row
neopixelExtended.rowOf5|param|rgb2: second RGB color of the NeoPixel row
neopixelExtended.rowOf5|param|rgb3: third RGB color of the NeoPixel row
neopixelExtended.rowOf5|param|rgb4: fourth RGB color of the NeoPixel row
neopixelExtended.rowOf5|param|rgb5: fifth RGB color of the NeoPixel row
neopixelExtended.rowOf8: Creates an array for a row of 8 colors
neopixelExtended.rowOf8|param|rgb1: first RGB color of the NeoPixel row
neopixelExtended.rowOf8|param|rgb2: second RGB color of the NeoPixel row
neopixelExtended.rowOf8|param|rgb3: third RGB color of the NeoPixel row
neopixelExtended.rowOf8|param|rgb4: fourth RGB color of the NeoPixel row
neopixelExtended.rowOf8|param|rgb5: fifth RGB color of the NeoPixel row
neopixelExtended.rowOf8|param|rgb6: sixth RGB color of the NeoPixel row
neopixelExtended.rowOf8|param|rgb7: seventh RGB color of the NeoPixel row
neopixelExtended.rowOf8|param|rgb8: eighth RGB color of the NeoPixel row
